feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Export download Issue - Find Technical Objects or Find Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Unlike ECC , S4 HANA Apps are not providing download of selected objects using export options ?

ECC Screen : Selected Item 8 , Output download 8 Items.

 

SAP S/4 HANA Fiori : Export download all objects 

Is there any workaround ? so Business can download selective data ?

BR.

R

entry.title: No Planning Tab in Display Maintenance Order Screen : SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content: No Planning Tab in Display Maintenance Order Screen : This is an issue for End User /business to view Planning data such as Maintenance Plan, Maintenance Item and Last Work Order created for Individual WO via Display Work Order app. What is alternative option offered by SAP in this case ?

entry.title: fleet management enhancement in Tcode IFCU
entry.content: I want to do the screen enhancement on transaction code IFCU screen to add the filed for external fleet of type p. However, i couldn't find any screen enhancement for it.

entry.title: how to get "installation & Dismantling" history of equipment
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

How can i get "installation & Dismantling" history of any equipment.

entry.title: Clarification on Work Clearance Management (WCM) in SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance Module
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am currently working on a business process document for Work Clearance Management (WCM) and need to outline the standard features and functionalities available out of the box in SAP S/4HANA. I understand that WCM requires additional licensing and includes the following capabilities:

  • Full electronic support for controlling hazardous work through permits and isolation procedures
  • Support for multiple levels of work permits and approvals
  • Management of operational lists, tags, and test tags within isolation procedures
  • A mobile app for WCM supporting Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedures

    Based on my research, I found that SAP provides a classic version of WCM, which is an out-of-the-box solution for SAP Plant Maintenance (PM). Can anyone confirm if this is accurate?

    Additionally, I am looking for detailed documentation or links regarding both the classic and enhanced versions of WCM.

    Lastly, I would like to know whether the following process steps attached align with the standard WCM solution within SAP PM, or if additional licensing and enhancements are required to cover them.

    Your insights and guidance would be greatly appreciated.

    Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Maintenance Scheduling process
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Can anyone help me in sharing SAP helpline portal of best practices information about Maintenance Scheduling process in plant maintenance. Which could cover steps of process and business process diagram to show the process and prepare a business process document 

Thanks

entry.title: Restricting transaction codes IW31, IW32, and IW33 at the order type level
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to restrict transaction codes IW31, IW32, and IW33 at the order type level. However, these transactions invoke the same authorization object, I_AUART, which contains only two authorization fields: WERKS and AUFART.

Could you confirm if there is an existing standard solution available for this requirement?

Looking forward to your response.

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Resource Scheduling with SAP Standard (Out-of-the-Box) Solution Without RSH/MRS
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

Our client wants to explore out-of-the-box resource scheduling functionality in SAP S/4HANA without purchasing Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planners (RSH) or Multi resource Scheduling (MRS) applications, as these require separate licenses.

Could anyone provide insights on the following?

  1. What is the business process flow for resource scheduling using only standard SAP functionalities like CM25 (Capacity Leveling) without RSH and MRS?
  2. Can we access or execute CM25 in the SAP Fiori environment?
  3. Are there any SAP articles or documentation explaining the limitations of CM25 compared to RSH?

Your guidance and references would be highly appreciated.

Thanks,
Sarvan Kumar

entry.title: Outline agreement price with respect to work order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have entered services in work order from Outline agreement and as well an individual service. So if we enter services other than Outline agreement services will the price of Outline agreement increase with respect to work order?

Thanks & Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: IP30 layout
entry.content:
In IP30 screen, some system have planning plant field, some system don't. I shared screenshots. Please let me know, how can I get planning plant field show the screen.

The system has 1909

The system has 2023 Hana.

entry.title: help me to configure G/L account determination based on Material Group
entry.content: G/L account determination based on Material Group for non stock material and external service procurement.

entry.title: Performance based equipment task list with multiple intervals
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to create a performance-based maintenance plan (running hours) for an equipment task list.

Is it possible to create one maintenance strategy that can be used on multiple equipment’s all with different hourly intervals? So basically a maintenance strategy with all the possible hourly intervals in it.

Furthermore, if I create an equipment task list (IA01) and open the maintenance package overview. There are only 2 digits to display the interval of the maintenance plan.

Is this even possible? Or is there a better way to implement performance-based maintenance plans? I use SAP version 770

entry.title: Alternative Movement Types for Asset Scrapping in SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Question: We are currently scrapping assets in SAP by transferring them to a designated scrap location using Movement Type 551 (Scrap Issue) via MB1A / MIGO.

Are there other movement types that can be used for asset scrapping in Inventory Management?

Additionally, should we explicitly list all possible movement types in our documentation, or would it be best to leave it open-ended for flexibility?

Would appreciate insights on best practices and any alternative movement types that might be relevant in specific scenarios.

thanks in advance!!

entry.title: Copy fields from equipment to work order
entry.content:
Need to know if we have selection on copy field values from technical object equipment/ Functional location to internal work order when create work order with respect to equipment/ Functional location.
We have specific requirement to not copy WBS element value from functional location/Equipment while creating work order.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with individual status of an object: airq for maintenance orders by phases
entry.content:
Hi eveyone. I need Help please!!!

Context: Im from latam and on my own languaje i have problems in the customizing: Configure Overall Status Profiles.

It results in Spanish exist an individual status named: (IANe = Info adicional necesaria). His equal in english is: (AIRQ = Additional Info Required). The problem ocurrs when i put the IANe and push Enter the status put it selves empty and dosent exist another status in the sistem that can work

PD: in 050 this part of the configuration its all ready in english and spanish but when i get out of the point of configuration in spanish it calls a error. I just pull x.

The image of upside is when i gonna configurate in spanish and i use the macth code

upside i chose status IANe and and I haven't hit enter yet.

upside i press enter and it clears it selves.

upside same point of the customize in the best practice server 050 when i put the system in spanish.

upside same point of the customizing in english 050

entry.title: Reactivating Archived Equipment / Asset – Is it possibility Through Enhancement ?
entry.content:
Is it possible to reactivate equipment once it has been archived in SAP S/4HANA? 

Can anyone confirm if there is any standard approach or enhancement available to achieve this? Additionally, are there any SAP Help Portal or SAP Learning articles that provide insights into handling such cases?

Looking forward to expert guidance on this topic.

entry.title: PM Order - Functional Location and Equipments on Operations
entry.content:
Hello experts ,

In the operation tab of a maintenance order, the Functional Location and Equipment fields are greyed out. I would like to enable these fields for editing. I know that by creating notfication the equipment and functional location can be picked up from the notfication but to give inputs at the screen instead of notification is there any option? if yes how to achieve this.

Could anyone guide me on the procedure or necessary configuration changes to achieve this?

entry.title: transaction OITA and assets under construction
entry.content:
Hi,

in OITA you define a investmentprofile with default assets under construction class. In V_T350_IV you assign the investment profile to a (PM-CS)-order class. When the order is released, the AuC is created.

in OITA

There's also the flag "fixed default class" where the help says "

Asset class for assets u. construction is not changeable

Use

Determines how the asset class can be entered for the asset under construction that belongs to an investment measure, when you create the investment measure. If this indicator is set, the asset class cannot be entered manually. The system then uses the asset class entered in the investment profile."

Am I wrong to assume that when the flag is not set, you should be able to choose your AuC-class when creating the asset? How can that be accomplished?

kr

Nico

entry.title: Work Center Auto Update in PM Order Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I wanted to know if it is possible to set the work center to auto update when a confirmation is performed.It should assume the work center of the person that performed the actual work and not the planned work center. 

One can plan for a certain skill level but work gets performed by a different one.

entry.title: Functionality of custom transactions (PM & DMS) already available as a standard transaction code?
entry.content:
Hello community,

A client has developed three custom transaction codes (Z) for specific functionalities, as described below:

- ZPM001 (DMS & PM): Displays a list of documents directly related to Plant Maintenance Objects such as orders, notifications, functional locations and equipment (image below)

 

 

 

 - ZPM002: Assigs a SAP user to a "User status", allowing the maintenance planner to identify the originating company area (e.g HR, Maintenance, production...) of a maintenance notification. (See image below)

 - ZPM003 (PM): Enables the mass upload of order confirmations into maintenance orders from a text file. (No image attached).

I would like to check whether there are any existing Standard transaction codes that could replace these functionalities. (My initial assessment is that there aren't).

Thanks in advance,

Sebastián
